songs.title: Nebular Ascension III – Ascending Beyond
songs.tags:
[STYLE / CONTEXT:]
[Progressive Psytrance with Full-On inflections, continuation of Nebular Ascension. Designed as an evolution: deeper, faster, richer. Inspired by Aura Vortex peak-time sets, tailored for massive open-air festivals and sunrise dance rituals.]

[MOOD:]
[Explosive, cosmic, transcendental, hypnotic, ecstatic, futuristic and otherworldly.]

[TEMPO:]
[142 BPM, with moments of rhythmic acceleration via polyrhythmic overlays.]

[KEY / SCALE:]
[A minor base, frequent modal shifts to Phrygian, Mixolydian, and synthetic scales with microtonal inflections for mysticism.]

songs.title: MONO CONTACT — SPES-R (Functional Minimal Techno)
songs.tags:
[STYLE / CONTEXT:]
[Functional Minimal Techno with a raw, clinical, and restrained sensual undertone.
Sensuality must be purely physical and implicit, emerging only from friction, proximity, repetition, and pressure.
No emotion, no expression, no narrative intent.
Sound should feel close, dry, intimate, and mechanical, like bodies moving in a confined dark space.
Designed as a professional DJ tool for underground clubs and long endurance sets.
Minimal without emptiness, sexual without softness, controlled without drama.]

songs.title: Vetter’s Tower — Club Edition
songs.tags:
Progressive House + Trance fusion for real-estate commercial aesthetic. 
Clean, modern, crystal-clear narration with rhythmic delivery over a futuristic groove.
Energetic but elegant. No harsh transients. No EDM clichés

songs.title: A psytrance-tribal journey at 128 BPM v4.5 g3
songs.tags: At 128 BPM, dense tribal percussion—djembe, frame drums, shakers, clay pots—locks with deep kicks and pulsing sub-bass. Layers include didgeridoo, flutes, droning pads, analog synths, spectral breaths, ritual chants, jungle sounds, glitched harmonics, polyrhythms, and binaural FX for hypnotic psytrance-tribal depth.

songs.title: OME Dark Psytrance x Ritual Electronica | Night Immersion | 152 BPM (Remix)
songs.tags: This dark psy, psy trance track kicks off with a spacious intro: pulsing sub bass, swirling metallic FX, and eerie filtered synths weaving in and out. Tension mounts with syncopated hi-hats and emerging tribal percussion, then erupts into a dense, high-BPM climax—distorted leads, aggressive rolling bass, rapid-fire snares, and hypnotic, evolving textures, driving energy relentlessly forward.

songs.title: Inspired by psycore
songs.tags:
[STYLE / CONTEXT:]
[High-energy Progressive Psytrance with Full-On inflections. Inspired by Aura Vortex’s peak-time festival style. Designed for maximum impact in the first seconds (social media hook) and extended evolution for club/festival use.]

[MOOD:]
[Immediate, explosive, hypnotic, psychedelic, euphoric, immersive, designed to hook listeners instantly.]

[TEMPO:]
[140 BPM steady base groove with layered polyrhythms and fractal arps.]

[KEY / SCALE:]
[A minor with shifts into Phrygian for mysticism and Mixolydian for lift.]

[OPENING DROP:]
[Immediate entry with kick+bass locked center + acid lead stabs + fractal arps orbiting stereo + FX sweeps diagonal. No intro fade, instant full drop. Whispered granular vocals close-to-ear for shock factor.]

songs.title: Dark Psy Ritual Surge
songs.tags: Pounding, EQ-sculpted kick and growling saturated FM sub form the dark psy foundation. Tribal drums drive with spatiality and saturation, while crunchy panned hats cut through. Lush animated leads, delay-soaked arps, granular evolving pads, and drifting drones build intensity. Modulated FX, eerie vocal textures, and massive ambience wrap each section with ethereal reverb, balancing chaos and trance.

songs.title: Dark Psy Ritual Surge
songs.tags: Dark psy and tribal trance infuse this high-energy track at 146 BPM. Start with ritual percussion, textured modular drones, and granular pads. Escalate with polyrhythmic tribal drums, FM synth bass, warped leads, and hypnotic glitches. Layer organic samples for intensity and controlled chaos.

songs.title: 🜂 [SPES – MINIMAL HI-TECH HOUSE TRICK CUT · TRACK 2 · v2]
songs.tags: Minimal High-Tech House | Dry punch groove | Turbo-offgrid hats | Trick mute engine | Bouncy warm sub | Club-focused minimalism without melody

songs.title: Pulsing Cyberpunk Club Track
songs.tags: Pulsing Cyberpunk Club Track, high-energy Bass House x Tech Trance fusion. Driving kick (center), rolling sub-bass, stuttered synth arps (wide L↔R), glitch FX, club crowd noise (rear), robotic vocal chops ("ignite the night," "turn it up," "lost in neon") echo and ping-pong, snappy percs and hi-hats sweep in stereo, layered lasers and risers (panned), FX: metallic sweeps, filtered swooshes, glassy risers, vinyl scratches, digital zaps. Use spatial reverb, delays, and 3D panning. Every element should be in motion—never static. Structure: explosive intro (8s), punchy drop, groove break with ambient pads (mid-field), climactic final drop, outro with dissolving synths. All sounds must be crisp, punchy, and cinematic; avoid mono or muddy layering.

songs.title: Free… Alive
songs.tags: The minimalist trance anthem opens with airy, high female vocals—breathy and sensual—repeating short, uplifting phrases over sparse, warm pads and subtle pulsing bass. The build layers crisp percussion and classic trance synths, swelling toward a pristine instrumental drop with shimmering arpeggios and euphoric melodies. For the final chorus, ethereal choir harmonies join, soaring above lush synth textures and deep rhythms, delivering an unfiltered, blissful peak before fading into a peaceful outro.

songs.title: OME Dark Psytrance x Experimental Night Fusion | Night-time, immersive, hypnotic, transcendent | 152
songs.tags:
<SONG_DETAILS>
[STYLE: OME Dark Psytrance x Experimental Night Fusion | Night-time, immersive, hypnotic, transcendent | 152 BPM]
[INSTRUMENTATION: Deep punchy kick (mono, front), heavy psychedelic basslines (pulsing, sidechained, moving front↔back), tribal percussion (wide stereo), layered modular synths (spatial sweeps L↔R↕), granular glitch FX, night forest atmospheres, shamanic chants, metallic bells, whisper vocals, high-resonance acid leads, drones and risers in multiple motion paths]
[PRODUCTION: Extreme stereo width, 3D spatial layers, constant automation, evolving reverbs, automated panning, every element introduced as an independent spatial layer — maximum OME depth, no static/mono stacking]
[OME_PARADIGM: All elements travel their own path — panning, swirling, circling, shifting up/down/around listener; powerful low-end must not mud the mix; all FX and vocals appear and disappear in layers with evolving motion and texture]
</SONG_DETAILS>

songs.title: Tomorrowland ou Ultra Music Festival
songs.tags: Electronic festival anthem blending cinematic build-ups and powerful duets. Male voice is warm, raspy, and emotional, inspired by Bryan Adam or Bruce S pringsteen. Female voice is strong, ethereal, and commanding like Bonnie Tyler or L ady Gaga in a trance set. Instrumentation features layered synths, filtered atmospheres, deep basslines, and high-impact percussions. Fade-in intro with progressive aération across all layers, leading to a breathtaking, sustained drop. Structured for tension and release, with transitions that simulate weightlessness before an explosive, euphoric climax. Designed for large-scale dancefloors and emotional connection through electronic storytelling. Perfect balance between intimacy and power, with emphasis on sonic immersion and spatial energy.

songs.title: A psytrance-tribal journey at 128 BPM
songs.tags: A psytrance-tribal journey at 128 BPM featuring deep kicks, pulsing sub-bass, layered tribal percussion (djembe, frame drums, shakers, clay pots), didgeridoo and flutes. Droning pads, analog and modular synths, glitched harmonics, ritual chants, jungle ambiance, and spectral breaths meld via psychoacoustic spatial layering, polyrhythms, and binaural FX for a hypnotic, sensory experience.

songs.title: Pchidelic Trance Ritual
songs.tags: A hypnotic 130 BPM groove driven by layered organic percussion, pulsing tribal drums, and experimental textures. Psychedelic synths spiral around a ritualistic bassline, with breaths, deep chants, and evolving FX weaving through dense forest-inspired atmospherics.

songs.title: GROK
songs.tags: Psytrance foundation with percussive tribal rhythms: organic hand drums, didgeridoo textures, and hypnotic flutes weaving through layered, psychedelic synths. Deep bass undercurrents drive the trance pulse, with evolving psicoacoustic FX and ritualistic vocal samples, climaxing in dense rhythmic interplay.

songs.title: One Day Closer to Home (feat. Bonnie Tyler & Trance Vocal)
songs.tags: High-register, raspy, trembling female vocal intro (Bonnie Tyler on the edge), emotional rock ballad with maximum vocal tension and yearning; transitions to trance female vocal (soaring, pure, euphoric), melodic synths, rolling bass, uplifting energy. Lyrics focus on hope, resilience, each day closer to light/home. Sectional contrast: intro is tense and raw, trance section is liberating and positive, outro is gentle, melodic affirmation. NO autotune, no EDM clichés, no digital coldness; just expressive, live, emotional performance and cinematic release.

songs.title: Closer, Home, Closer (Vocal Anthem)
songs.tags: High-register, raspy, trembling female vocal intro (Bonnie Tyler on the edge), emotional rock ballad with maximum vocal tension and yearning; transitions to trance female vocal (soaring, pure, euphoric), melodic synths, rolling bass, uplifting energy. Lyrics focus on hope, resilience, each day closer to light/home. Sectional contrast: intro is tense and raw, trance section is liberating and positive, outro is gentle, melodic affirmation. NO autotune, no EDM clichés, no digital coldness; just expressive, live, emotional performance and cinematic release.

songs.title: Mentirosa
songs.tags:
[STYLE: Sertanejo Universitário + Forró/Piseiro Fusion]
    [MOOD: Festive, Humorous, Upbeat, Danceable, Regional]
    [INSTRUMENTATION: Digital accordion (sanfona) riff lead, steel-string acoustic guitar (open chords), clean electric guitar (countermelody), live drum kit in 2/4 with layered electronic kick+snare, hi-hats/shakers (triangle feel), handclaps, electric bass (straight pulsating), crowd FX (palmas, shouts)]
    [VOCALS: Male duo lead (tenor voices, bright and harmonic), with second voice in thirds; guest male vocal (slightly rough, with northeastern accent), playful interjections (“oh!”, “ai, ai, ai!”, “que bandida!”)]
    [TEMPO: 128–132 BPM, forró/piseiro bounce]
    [PRODUCTION: Radio-ready, polished, but live festive feel. Vocals central, sanfona bright in mid-highs, bass+kick glued for dance energy. Light plate reverb on vocals, short delay for interjections, crowd ambience layered subtly.]

[C# minor with modal shifts (Phrygian b2, Dorian #6).]

songs.title: Dark Psy Ritual Surge
songs.tags: Dark psy and tribal trance infuse this high-energy track at 146 BPM. Start with ritual percussion, textured modular drones, and granular pads. Escalate with polyrhythmic tribal drums, FM synth bass, warped leads, and hypnotic glitches. Layer organic samples for intensity and controlled chaos.

songs.title: Beach Mirage FunkTrance (Tropical Psy + Funk Carioca)
songs.tags: Tropical Psy / Goa Light fused with Funk Carioca, fast psy bassline with tamborzão percussion, tropical melodies (pan flutes, steel drums, marimbas), layered with vocal whispers in Portuguese (“vem, sente, toca”), playful and sensual but cosmic, designed for sunrise beach festival energy

songs.title: BC VIBES all
songs.tags:
[STYLE / CONTEXT:]
[High-energy Progressive Psytrance with Full-On inflections. Inspired by Aura Vortex’s peak-time festival style. Designed for maximum impact in the first seconds (social media hook) and extended evolution for club/festival use.]

[MOOD:]
[Immediate, explosive, hypnotic, psychedelic, euphoric, immersive, designed to hook listeners instantly.]

[TEMPO:]
[140 BPM steady base groove with layered polyrhythms and fractal arps.]

[KEY / SCALE:]
[A minor with shifts into Phrygian for mysticism and Mixolydian for lift.]

[OPENING DROP:]
[Immediate entry with kick+bass locked center + acid lead stabs + fractal arps orbiting stereo + FX sweeps diagonal. No intro fade, instant full drop. Whispered granular vocals close-to-ear for shock factor.]

songs.title: Babalos Frequency
songs.tags: Dark hi-tech psytrance with twisted underground energy; 170+ BPM, razor-edged synth leads, glitchy FX, and elastic bassline pulses. Male vocals as eerie spoken chants processed through delays and pitch-shifts. Arrangement builds from sparse whispers into full-on chaos by the first hook, then strips back to a hypnotic mid-section before a final explosive drop.
